name: the-workshop
description: THE WORKSHOP — a walkable museum of rooms, images and machines.

scripts.test: node --test tests/workshop-foundation.test.mjs tests/workshop-integration.test.mjs tests/workshop-visit.test.mjs tests/workshop-record.test.mjs tests/workshop-garden-study.test.mjs
scripts.test:all: npm test && npm run test:browser && npm run test:instrument
